# Flora - Green Focus · Productivity

Generated: Jul 20, 2026, 10:51 PM

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)

## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      4 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Apr 24, 2026 - Jun 13, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _rwnenenenenenenen_, Jun 13, 2026, 2/5: "i love this app i use it all the time. ive been using it for 3 years now but it is SOOO glitchy. when i do a certain amount of hours and i pause it for like 3 minutes, it randomly just removes all the previous time i spent studying so i lose my prpgress. do better!!"
            2. _Aine C_, May 10, 2026, 3/5: "I love this app for helping me focus & having the option to grow a ‘garden’ to help is a really nice feature. However it’s incredibly glitchy & reporting errors doesn’t help. There’s no reply or update. Some issues include notifications at the end of app time not working, app crashing, ‘killing’ trees incorrectly, not recording time, clearing settings / categories. Some recent updates have helped but glitches remain."
            3. _T R C VLOGZ_, Apr 24, 2026, 3/5: "Was a good app for months, but gone buggy af recently, eg I’d start a timer, leave my phone off, get the notification that my tree has grown and go back on, the timer still where it was / up to 5 mins after where I left it! Then today I can’t even start a session! Real pain cos it was such a good app!"

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      1 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Apr 28, 2026 - Apr 28, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Idhdjebwbqh_, Apr 28, 2026, 4/5: "Love the app so much, it’s super motivating. However there are a few bugs I noticed: 1. Sometimes when I pledge a price and pause the focus (and come back), when the session is finished the app tells me I need to pay the price even though the tree never died. 2. Sometimes my focus sessions don’t record properly, e.g. if I set a 2 hour session, pause for 5 minutes and come back, the entire session will only be recorded as 10 mins long (make it make sense…) 3. Sometimes the app lies to me and tells me I have more bits than I actually have, I only realise when I try and buy a plant and it doesn’t allow me to buy it due to “insufficient bits”."
